items.title:
I spent 250,000 AI credits on Kling 3.0 so you don’t have to. 🎬

Right now, Kling 3.0 is an absolute powerhouse. Until Seedance 2.0 finally drops, this is the heavyweight champion of AI video models.

After burning through a quarter of a million credits building out actual projects, I’ve found where this model is a unicorn and what still needs work. I’m putting together a full breakdown of its exact strengths and its biggest weaknesses.

👇 This is Part 2. Make sure you’re following, and drop a comment below if you want me to remind you when Part 3 drops next week!

(If you’re wondering what the best AI video model is right now, Kling 3.0 is currently head of the class for cinematic generation. You may ask how to use Kling AI to get consistent results, and understanding its specific strengths and weaknesses is crucial. While the community waits for the full release of Seedance 2.0, mastering current generative AI video tools and prompt engineering is the quickest way to produce production-ready AI filmmaking.)

Made on @Freepik
